info.name: Soma EHR — health + medication smoke
info.description:
Smoke flow for PUT /api/medications/:id (see docs/medication-smoke-test.md).

=== Clerk JWT (session token for Authorization) ===
The API validates Clerk session JWTs.

1. Start repo root `.env` with CLERK_PUBLISHABLE_KEY + CLERK_SECRET_KEY; start API: `pnpm --filter @soma-ehr/api dev`.
2. Start Clerk dev UI: `pnpm --filter @soma-ehr/clerk-dev dev` → http://localhost:5173 — same Clerk application; allow localhost:5173 in Clerk Dashboard.
3. Sign in → **Refresh JWT** → **Copy** — paste ONE LINE into Postman variable `clerk_session_jwt` (Collection or Environment).

Do not paste `CLERK_JWT=` or wrap with extra quotes/newlines.
JWTs expire; refresh before each run if you get 401.

=== Prerequisites ===
- Seed medication via SQL (`organization_id` must match variable `organization_id`).
- Copy returned `id` into `medication_id`.

Variables: base_url (default localhost:3000), clerk_session_jwt, organization_id, medication_id.

request.description: Public check that the API is up.

exec: throw new Error('Set clerk_session_jwt (Clerk JWT from apps/clerk-dev after sign-in — one line, no Bearer prefix here).');
throw new Error('Set medication_id to UUID from SQL INSERT … RETURNING id');
pm.test('JSON has medication-ish fields when body is JSON', function () {
console.warn('Response was not JSON or missing id');

request.description: Requires seed row matching organization_id header. Bearer uses session JWT — not publishable key.
